name: Chicken Breasts Romano- Sbkk78a
recipeInstructions:
1. In 1 tablespoon oil, sauté sliced mushrooms and just before they are done, add garlic to the pan to sizzle.
2. Remove the sautéed mushroom mixture and set aside.
3. Dredge chicken breasts in flour, folding the edges under to plump the breasts. Brown with the folded edges down to seal and maintain shape.
4. Brown the smooth side of the chicken breasts, then arrange them smooth side up.
5. Pour tomato juice over all the ingredients.
6. Sprinkle vinegar, sugar, and herbs evenly.
7. Spread chopped onions and the mushroom/garlic mixture over the chicken breasts.
8. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons Romano cheese and top with chopped parsley.
9. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
10. Remove to a serving platter and top with the remaining Romano cheese.
